Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAUL J. STEINER, TEL. NO. 981-6100 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. HOWARD MELAMED, TEL. NO. (925) 932-0417 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ERIC NORDSKOG AND LAW OFFICES OF ERIC L. NORDSKOG'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE COURT IS DETERMINING THAT THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES, WHICH WOULD BE AWARDED AS COSTS AT THE END OF THE LITIGATION PURSUANT TO A CONTRACTUAL TERM, IS INCONSISTENT WITH THE CONTRACT. MOTION TO STRIKE ALLEGATION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS IS ALSO GRANTED. MR. MELAMED TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Sonia Wong, CSR # 11288 =301/PJB
